assets.purpose: Required fields of a persistent-scratchpad design report: safe path, fixed sections, entry filter, read-once protocol, idempotent write policy, survives-compact invariant.
Allowed path rules, fixed sections, evidence rule, read-once / idempotent-write / survives-compact policies, blocked anti-patterns, and route-aways.
Scored, mostly-blocking acceptance criteria mapped to the gate and the eval cases.
Human pre-delivery checklist mirroring the acceptance gate, with evidence tags.
